billingConfig.title: Billing mode
billingConfig.modeDescription: Self-use records usage only. Subscription billing limits usage by plan credits. Usage billing calculates cost from model pricing.
billingConfig.prepaidAmountDescription: In usage billing and subscription overage billing, calls can start only when the account balance meets this amount. The final deduction still uses the actual bill.

payment.title: Payment settings
payment.usdToCnyRateDescription: Used to convert the USD base price to a CNY payment amount.
payment.channelsDescription: Stripe and EPay can be enabled together. Users choose the channel at checkout.
payment.enableStripeDescription: Allow users to pay through Stripe Checkout.
payment.stripeWebhookEndpointDescription: Add this webhook endpoint in Stripe Dashboard.
payment.stripeWebhookSecretDescription: Used to verify Stripe webhook signatures.
payment.enableEPayDescription: Allow users to choose payment types through EPay.
payment.epayGatewayDescription: EPay API gateway. Must start with http:// or https://.
payment.epayTypesDescription: Use name as the frontend display name and type as the channel value sent to EPay.

plans.title: Plans
plans.dialogDescription: Configure plan price, usage credit, and discount.
plans.name: Name

redemption.title: Redemption codes
redemption.createDescription: Generated codes are shown after creation and can later be copied from the list.
redemption.editDescription: Only status, limits, expiry, and description can be changed.
redemption.deleteDescription: Deleted codes are hidden and cannot be redeemed. Redemption history is retained.
redemption.bulkConfirmDescription: Apply this operation to {count} selected redemption codes.
redemption.unavailable: This redemption code cannot be redeemed now
redemption.unavailableSelf: The current billing mode is self-hosted, so redemption codes cannot be redeemed.
redemption.unavailableModeMismatch: The current billing mode is {currentMode}; this code only applies to {codeMode}.
redemption.unavailableExhausted: This redemption code has no remaining redemptions.
redemption.createdCodesDescription: These are the full codes generated in this batch. You can also copy them later from the list.

modelPricing.title: Model pricing
modelPricing.dialogDescription: Configure the platform model billing mode and base unit prices.
modelPricing.jsonHint: Valid JSON syncs to the form state immediately. Saving still uses the current model pricing API.

jsonErrors.root: Model pricing JSON must be an object.
jsonErrors.model: Platform model name cannot be changed from JSON.
jsonErrors.mode: pricingMode must be token, call, duration, or tiered.
jsonErrors.tiered: Tiered pricing requires a non-empty tieredPricing.tiers array.

modelPricing.tieredHint: Tier matching uses raw input token ranges.
modelPricing.tierNote: Limits are entered in K tokens. 0 means the last tier is unlimited.

toolPricing.title: Tool pricing
toolPricing.nativeToolBillingDescription: When enabled, administrator-enabled official native tools are billed using the prices below. Self-use mode still records usage only.
toolPricing.defaultPriceDescription: All official native tools use a configurable per-call price. Set 0 to avoid separate billing. Model tokens produced by tool results are still billed through model pricing.
toolPricing.note: Native tool prices are configured as per-call rates. Tools without upstream-reported call counts will not create separate native tool billing items.

toast.sessionExpiredDescription: Please sign in again to continue.
toast.unknownError: Request failed. Please try again later.
toast.paymentRateRequired: Enter a valid USD to CNY rate when EPay is enabled.
toast.stripeRequired: Stripe requires Secret Key and Webhook Secret.
toast.epayRequired: EPay requires gateway URL, merchant ID, and merchant key.
toast.epayTypesInvalid: EPay payment types must be a JSON array containing name and type.
toast.prepaidInvalidDescription: Enter a USD amount greater than or equal to 0.
toast.nativeToolBillingSaveFailed: Failed to save native tool billing
toast.importInvalidJSON: Import failed: JSON does not match the model pricing schema
toast.importEmpty: Import failed: no model pricing entries to import
toast.redemptionInvalidCodeFormat: Code must be 3-64 letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
toast.redemptionInvalidQuantity: Quantity must be a positive integer.
toast.redemptionInvalidCredit: Credit amount must be greater than 0.
toast.redemptionInvalidDuration: Duration days must be greater than 0.
toast.redemptionInvalidMaxRedemptions: Total uses must be a positive integer, or empty for unlimited.
toast.redemptionInvalidPerUserLimit: Per-user uses must be a positive integer.
toast.redemptionInvalidExpiresAt: Expiration is invalid. Choose the date and time again.
toast.redemptionExpiredAtPast: Expiration must be later than the current time.
toast.redemptionUserLimitExceedsTotal: Per-user limit cannot exceed the total limit.
toast.redemptionManualQuantityInvalid: A manual code can only be created once.
toast.redemptionBulkRevealSkipped: {count} redemption codes could not be decrypted and were skipped.
toast.redemptionCodeRevealUnavailable: This code has no copyable encrypted content, so the full code cannot be copied.
toast.redemptionDeletePartialFailed: Some redemption codes were not deleted

importErrors.invalidJSON: File content is not valid JSON
importErrors.rootObject: Model pricing JSON must be an object keyed by platform model name
importErrors.emptyModelName: Platform model name cannot be empty
importErrors.invalidPricingMode: {model}.pricingMode must be token, call, duration, or tiered
importErrors.invalidNumber: {model}.{field} must be a number greater than or equal to 0
importErrors.invalidTieredPricing: {model}.{field} must contain a non-empty tiers array
